Meaning.En: A device that sprays water, typically used for bathing.
Meaning.Example: She turned on the shower and stepped in.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng vòi sen trong phòng tắm sau khi tập thể dục.
Situation.En: Using the shower in the bathroom after exercise.

Meaning.En: To wash oneself under a shower.
Meaning.Example: I usually shower before going to work in the morning.

Situation.Vi: Hành động tắm nhanh bằng vòi sen vào buổi sáng.
Situation.En: The action of taking a quick shower in the morning.

Meaning.Example: We got caught in a sudden shower and had to run for cover.

Situation.Vi: Mưa rào bất ngờ khi đang đi dạo công viên.
Situation.En: A sudden shower while walking in the park.

Meaning.Vi: Nhóm người (thường dùng trong cụm "shower of praise/criticism")
Meaning.En: A large amount of something, especially praise or criticism, directed at someone.
Meaning.Example: The actor received a shower of praise after the award-winning performance.

Situation.Vi: Nhận được hàng loạt lời khen ngợi sau chiến thắng.
Situation.En: Receiving numerous compliments after a victory.
